'''Troy Slattery''' (born 6 August 1973) is a former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at club level for the [[South Sydney Rabbitohs]], [[Huddersfield Giants]], and the [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]], as a {{rlp|fe|pr|hk|sr}}, or {{rlp|lk}}.<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.ssralmanac.com/mobile/players_s/player_slattery_troy.htm|title=South Sydney Rabbitohs Rugby League Player Report - Troy Slattery|website=www.ssralmanac.com}}</ref>
